axis_responsibility.Agent: Adapter error is performer/adapter receipt evidence without returned AgentFact; do not synthesize returned, success, failure, or quality fields.
axis_responsibility.Brick: Work invariant is the declared Building Plan and birth/declaration chain; the repair should preserve declared plan copy purity.
axis_responsibility.Link: Stop disposition is human/COO-authored transition lifecycle evidence; support records it but does not choose Movement or target.
axis_responsibility.Support: support/operator and support/recording may order writes, preserve/reconcile evidence, and prevent live adapter calls on paper-stop.

returned.design_summary: Design the repair as support-surface hardening only: write a byte-identical declaration birth certificate before the first adapter boundary, make adapter-error stop disposition a paper close that never asks the adapter for a missing return, reset stale generated claim/manifest evidence on overwrite, and make Codex local transcript persistence the default unless BRICK_CODEX_EPHEMERAL=1 is explicitly set.
edge_cases: First-step adapter error with zero completed Agent returns.
Mid-walk adapter error with earlier completed returns but no returned fact for the held step.

BRICK_CODEX_EPHEMERAL unset, empty, or non-1 should all drop --ephemeral; only literal 1 preserves current ephemeral behavior.
